=Index of exceptions=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Account_already_activated_unconnected"| exception Handlers.Account_already_activated_unconnected >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when an account has been already activated and no user is
    connected~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Account_not_activated"| exception Db.Account_not_activated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when the account is not activated~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Already_exists"| exception User.Already_exists >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception used if an user already exists~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Custom_action_link"| exception Handlers.Custom_action_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when something went wrong with an action link key~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Empty_password"| exception Db.Empty_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when user attempts to connect with empty password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Error_while_cropping"| exception Uploader.Error_while_cropping >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Raised if an error occurred while cropping a picture~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Error_while_resizing"| exception Uploader.Error_while_resizing >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Raised if an error occurred while resizing a picture~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="FCM_empty_response"| exception Fcm_notif.FCM_empty_response >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="FCM_missing_field"| exception Fcm_notif.FCM_missing_field >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="FCM_no_json_response"| exception Fcm_notif.FCM_no_json_response >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="FCM_unauthorized"| exception Fcm_notif.FCM_unauthorized >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Invalid_action_key"| exception Handlers.Invalid_action_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when the key is oudated~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Invalid_action_link_key"| exception Db.User.Invalid_action_link_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Invalid_mailer"| exception Email.Invalid_mailer >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised if the mailer is invalid~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Main_email_removal_attempt"| exception Db.Main_email_removal_attempt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when there is an attempt to remove the main email~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="No_such_group"| exception Group.No_such_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when no there is no group corresponding to the request ~(for
    example wrong ~I~D or name~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="No_such_resource"| exception Handlers.No_such_resource >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when the requested resource is not available~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="No_such_resource"| exception Db.No_such_resource >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when no resource corresponds to the database request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="No_such_user"| exception User.No_such_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception used if an user doesn~'t exist~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="No_such_user"| exception Db.No_such_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when users attempts to connect with unknown identifier~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Not_connected"| exception Session.Not_connected >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Password_not_set"| exception Db.Password_not_set >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when user has no password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Permission_denied"| exception Session.Permission_denied >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Predicate_failed"| exception Page.Predicate_failed >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Wrong_password"| exception Db.Wrong_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised when password do not match~.
>>
|
\\
